classification.cause: llama.cpp crashed (segfault) — usually a driver or model file issue
classification.fix: Check: 1) ROCm/driver version compatible with llama.cpp build, 2) model file not truncated (verify checksum), 3) VRAM not exhausted.

classification.cause: unknown
classification.fix: check the logs for error messages

error: VRAM too low: model needs ~20.0 GiB, but only ~15.6 GiB will be available after unloading the current model. Close other GPU apps or lower context: forge-model set test-model ctx=8192

classification.cause: Model too big for available VRAM — swap refused by pre-flight check
classification.fix: Close other GPU apps or lower the context size. Try: forge-model set <model> ctx=8192

classification.cause: unknown
classification.fix: check the logs for error messages
